stemHtml: Given a multi engine aeroplane, which of the following combinations will give the least control problem during an engine failure?

options.a: An aircraft with both propellers turning clockwise.
options.b: An aircraft with both propellers turning anticlockwise.
options.c: An aircraft with the left propeller turning anticlockwise and the right propeller turning clockwise.
options.d: An aircraft with the left propeller turning clockwise and the right propeller turning anticlockwise.
